INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT AND BANKING ACT
(MiFID AND MiFIR ADMINISTRATIVE PENALTIES,
MEASURES AND INVESTIGATORY POWERS)

[ L.S.370.40

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.40
REGOLAMENTI DWAR INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT
AND BANKING ACT (MiFID AND MiFIR
ADMINISTRATIVE PENALTIES, MEASURES
AND INVESTIGATORY POWERS)*
3 ta’ Jannar, 2018
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 401 tal-2017, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 135 tal2022 u 216 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
